title: Arguments node outputs null values
symptom: The Arguments node is outputting 'null' instead of the expected values, causing issues in the workflow.
not_this_if: The workflow executes correctly without referencing previous nodes
root_cause: The Arguments node is trying to reference variable values from a previous node that do not exist in the expected format. This can happen if the node names are not correctly referenced or if the data flow is misconfigured.
fix_steps: Change the mapping in the Arguments node to use named references instead of $json.
Use the correct syntax to access the previous node's output, e.g., {{ $('tool-call-name').first().json.body.message.toolCalls[0].function.arguments.requestTime }}.
Test the workflow again to ensure the Arguments node outputs the correct values.
agent_instruction: Update the Arguments node mappings to use named references for previous node outputs.
